creator: root@cache-t.hrz.uni-bielefeld.de
text:
xmgr-4.1.1 was marked broken on an ELF 3.0-RELEASE system. I can't
	verify this on my home machine which is an fresch install of 3.0.
	However, I use Motif-2.1 (ELF, build from source), which requires
	the additional linking of -lXp and -lXwchars (wide character support
	extracted from X11R5 contrib tree). So I make changes to the configure
	script of xmgr to recognise the settings of MOTIFLIB in
	/etc/make.conf. Now the port builds, installs, and runs clean on my
	system!

Fix: 

Fetch the port from

	  ftp://ftp.Uni-Bielefeld.DE/pub/systems/FreeBSD/lkoeller/xmgr-4.1.1-port.tar.gz

Thanks

Lars

PS: Please reply to

  Lars.Koeller@Uni-Bielefeld.DE

or

  lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
